title: Nick White blasts Clavicular over viral kiss with trans model, says he destroyed the image that made him famous
summary_full: Nick White criticized Clavicular after a viral video showed the influencer kissing Polish transgender model Adeli Pali, claiming the incident had severely damaged the image that made him popular. During his livestream, White argued Clavicular's brand would "never be the same" and compared the controversy to other influencers who lost credibility after public incidents. The clip has sparked widespread debate online, with opinions divided over its impact on Clavicular's reputation.
